zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Marfield於1386年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾伍利時，她的父親Peter Marfield20歲，母親Alice Mirfield20歲。她於1411年與Christopher Woodruffe在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1419年在英國英格蘭肯特享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Marfield于1386年出生在英国英格兰越可爾伍利时，她的父亲Peter Marfield20岁，母亲Alice Mirfield20岁。她于1411年与Christopher Woodruffe在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1419年在英国英格兰肯特享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Macclesfield in Cheshire. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Maccel (genitive Macceles) + Old English feld ‘open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Marfield was born in 1386, in Woolley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Peter Marfield, was 20 and her mother, Alice Mirfield, was 20. She married Christopher Woodruffe in 1411, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1419, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Marfield est née en 1386, à Woolley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Peter Marfield, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Alice Mirfield, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Christopher Woodruffe en 1411, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1419, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Marfield 1386 in Woolley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter Marfield 20 und ihre Mutter Alice Mirfield 20. Sie hat 1411 in Yorkshire, England Christopher Woodruffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1419 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Marfield è nata il nel 1386 nel Woolley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Peter Marfield, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Alice Mirfield, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Christopher Woodruffe nel 1411, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1419, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Marfieldが1386年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウリーで生まれた時，父Peter Marfieldは20歳，母Alice Mirfieldは20歳であった。1411年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでChristopher Woodruffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1419年にイギリスイギリスケントで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Marfield(이)가 1386년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 보리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Marfield(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Mirfield(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1411년 영국 요르크실르에서 Christopher Woodruffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1419년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Marfield nasceu em 1386, em Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Peter Marfield, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Alice Mirfield, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Christopher Woodruffe em 1411, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1419, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Marfield родилась в 1386 г. в местности вулли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Peter Marfield было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Mirfield, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Christopher Woodruffe в 1411 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1419 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Marfield nació en 1386, en Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Peter Marfield, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Alice Mirfield, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Christopher Woodruffe en 1411, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1419, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 33 años.
